message:
feat(http2): wire send-side flow control into app/handler paths (bd-2c9t)

Extend write_h2_response to accept an optional H2FlowControl reference
and use h2_fc_clamp_send for flow-control-aware DATA frame emission.
All 3 HTTP/2 paths now respect peer receive windows when sending.

- Add flow_control parameter to write_h2_response with stream_send_window
  tracking and h2_fc_clamp_send integration for both Bytes and Stream bodies
- Add WINDOW_UPDATE handling to outer frame loops in app/handler paths
  so connection-level send window stays current between requests
- Add peer_window_update_connection tracking in body-read inner loops
  for both app and handler paths

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
